Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: fraternal lodges [300007071], societies' buildings [300007063], social and civic buildings [300005102], single built works by function [300004894], single built works by specific type [300004795], single built works (built environment) [300004790], Single Built Works (hierarchy name) [300004789], Built Environment (hierarchy name) [300264550], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: halls (single built works) [300444146], single built works by design [300007962], single built works by specific type [300004795], single built works (built environment) [300004790], Single Built Works (hierarchy name) [300004789], Built Environment (hierarchy name) [300264550], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Buildings in which (prior to the 17th century) skilled stone masons or (since the early 17th century) members of the societies of Freemasons gathered, whether socially or professionally.

Edificio en el que (anteriormente al siglo XVII) se reunían los albañiles de piedras experimentados o (desde los inicios del siglo XVII) los miembros de las sociedades franmasónicas, bien social o profesionalmente.
Wordt gebruikt voor gebouwen waar (sinds de 17e eeuw) leden van de genootschappen van Vrijmetselaars bijeen kwamen, zowel sociaal als professioneel.
（十七世紀前）供具專業技藝之石匠或（十七世紀早期之後）共濟會成員社交聚會或舉行專業會議的場所。

Non-Preferred_Term.Term_Text: gong ji hui ji hui suo
gòng jì huì jí huì suǒ
kung chi hui chi hui so
